review:
[
  {
    "type": "Bug",
    "conclusion": "修复SSH连接时远程CLI安装路径和二进制名称未根据产品版本区分的问题。",
    "description": "代码变更的主要目的是解决SSH连接远程主机时，总是使用稳定版（stable）的CLI路径和二进制名称的问题。原代码硬编码了稳定版的路径（`~/.vscode-cli`）和二进制名称（`code`），这会导致当本地运行的是Insiders版本时，远程安装和启动的仍然是稳定版CLI，可能引发版本不匹配。变更引入了根据产品版本（quality）动态生成路径和二进制名称的逻辑。然而，在 `_quality` getter 中，当 `this._productService.quality` 为空时，默认返回 `'insider'`，这与函数 `getRemoteCLIDir` 和 `getRemoteCLIBin` 中对 `quality` 参数的处理逻辑不完全一致。`getRemoteCLIDir` 函数中，当 `quality` 为 `'stable'` 或空字符串时，都返回 `'~/.vscode-cli'`。如果 `_quality` 返回 `'insider'`，而 `getRemoteCLIDir` 期望空字符串代表稳定版，这可能导致路径生成错误。虽然从上下文看，`'insider'` 很可能是一个有效的非稳定版标识，但默认值 `'insider'` 与函数中 `!quality` 的判断存在潜在的逻辑冲突，可能导致非稳定版被错误地安装到稳定版目录。",
    "evidence": "`private get _quality(): string {\n\t\treturn this._productService.quality || 'insider';\n\t}`\n`function getRemoteCLIDir(quality: string): string {\n\treturn quality === 'stable' || !quality ? '~/.vscode-cli' : `~/.vscode-cli-${quality}`;\n}`",
    "advice": "建议统一 `_quality` getter 的默认值与 `getRemoteCLIDir`/`getRemoteCLIBin` 函数的逻辑。如果 `getRemoteCLIDir` 函数中 `!quality` 的判断意图是处理未定义或空字符串的情况，那么 `_quality` getter 的默认值 `'insider'` 是合理的，因为它是一个非空字符串。但为了更清晰，可以检查 `IProductService.quality` 的可能值（如 `'stable'`, `'insider'`, `'exploration'` 等），并确保 `_quality` 返回的值是其中之一。如果 `IProductService.quality` 可能为 `undefined`，且期望的默认行为是使用非稳定版，那么当前代码是可行的。但建议在注释中说明这一点，或者将 `getRemoteCLIDir` 中的 `!quality` 判断改为更明确的 `quality === 'stable' || quality === '' || quality === undefined`，以增强可读性。",
    "confidence": 0.8,
    "severity": "Medium"
  },
  {
    "type": "Readability",
    "conclusion": "修复SSH连接时远程CLI安装路径和二进制名称未根据产品版本区分的问题。",
    "description": "新增的 `getRemoteCLIDir` 和 `getRemoteCLIBin` 函数提高了代码的模块化和可读性，将路径和二进制名称的生成逻辑集中管理。然而，函数名 `getRemoteCLIBin` 返回的是完整的路径（包括目录和二进制文件名），而不仅仅是二进制文件名，这可能会引起误解。通常 `Bin` 后缀可能暗示只返回二进制文件名（如 `code` 或 `code-insiders`），但这里返回的是完整路径。",
    "evidence": "`function getRemoteCLIBin(quality: string): string {\n\tconst binaryName = quality === 'stable' ? 'code' : 'code-insiders';\n\treturn `${getRemoteCLIDir(quality)}/${binaryName}`;\n}`",
    "advice": "建议考虑将函数重命名为 `getRemoteCLIPath` 或 `getRemoteCLIExecutablePath`，以更准确地反映其返回的是完整路径。或者，可以将其拆分为两个函数：一个返回目录，一个返回二进制文件名，然后在需要的地方组合。这可以提高函数的单一职责和可测试性。",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "severity": "Low"
  },
  {
    "type": "Design",
    "conclusion": "修复SSH连接时远程CLI安装路径和二进制名称未根据产品版本区分的问题。",
    "description": "代码变更将产品版本（quality）作为参数传递给 `startRemoteAgentHost` 和 `_ensureCLIInstalled` 方法，这是一个好的设计改进，使得这些函数的行为依赖于注入的服务（`IProductService`）。但是，`_quality` 作为一个私有getter被多次调用（在 `startRemoteAgentHost` 调用和 `_ensureCLIInstalled` 中调用 `getRemoteCLIDir`/`getRemoteCLIBin` 时）。虽然getter通常开销不大，但多次计算相同的值可能带来微小的性能开销，并且如果 `_productService.quality` 的计算有副作用（虽然不太可能），可能会产生意外行为。",
    "evidence": "在 `_connect` 方法中：`await startRemoteAgentHost(sshClient, this._logService, this._quality, config.remoteAgentHostCommand);` 在 `_ensureCLIInstalled` 方法中：`const cliDir = getRemoteCLIDir(this._quality);\n\t\tconst cliBin = getRemoteCLIBin(this._quality);`",
    "advice": "可以考虑在构造函数或 `_connect` 方法开始时，将 `this._quality` 的值缓存到一个局部变量中，然后传递这个变量，以避免多次调用getter。这可以提高代码的清晰度，并确保在整个连接过程中使用一致的质量值。例如：`const quality = this._quality;`，然后在后续调用中使用 `quality`。",
    "confidence": 0.7,
    "severity": "Low"
  }
]

review_comments:
['Using `Object.create(paneCompositePart, …)` to “wrap” the part changes the `this` value for *all* other `IPaneCompositePart` method calls that `PaneCompositeBar` makes (e.g. `getActivePaneComposite()`, `getPaneComposite()`, etc.). Because these methods mutate instance state, writes will land on the wrapper object (shadowing the real part’s fields) and can break pane composite behavior in subtle ways.

Consider intercepting `openPaneComposite` without altering `this` for other methods (e.g. patch `openPaneComposite` with a bound delegate + restore on dispose, or use a `Proxy` that binds function properties to the original target).', 'The chat shortcut view container ID is duplicated here as a string literal. Since `ChatShortcutViewContainerId` is now exported from `workbench/contrib/chat/browser/chat.ts`, reusing that constant (or otherwise centralizing the ID) would avoid drift if the identifier ever changes.', 'This test asserts the view container is registered, but nothing in this file imports the module that performs the registration (`chatParticipant.contribution.ts`, which is pulled in via `chat.contribution.ts`). In isolation this can fail depending on test execution order/global side effects.

To make the test self-contained, explicitly import the contribution module (or `chat.contribution.ts`) before querying the `ViewContainersRegistry` (and prefer static `import` over `require` here for consistency).', "## Pull request overview

This PR adds an experiment-gated Chat entry point to the **top Activity Bar** by registering a lightweight sidebar view container (`workbench.panel.chatShortcut`) and intercepting attempts to open it so that clicking the icon toggles Chat in the user’s configured location.

**Changes:**
- Introduces `ChatShortcutViewContainerId` and registers a new sidebar view container gated by `config.chat.showInActivityBar`.
- Adds the `chat.showInActivityBar` configuration setting with `experiment: { mode: 'startup' }`.
- Intercepts `openPaneComposite` for the shortcut container to execute `workbench.action.chat.toggle` instead of opening the container, plus adds a small unit test.

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 5 out of 5 changed files in this pull request and generated 3 comments.

<details>
<summary>Show a summary per file</summary>

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| src/vs/workbench/contrib/chat/browser/chat.ts | Adds `ChatShortcutViewContainerId` constant. |
| src/vs/workbench/contrib/chat/browser/chat.contribution.ts | Registers `chat.showInActivityBar` experiment-gated setting. |
| src/vs/workbench/contrib/chat/browser/chatParticipant.contribution.ts | Registers the Activity Bar “Chat shortcut” sidebar view container + gated view. |
| src/vs/workbench/browser/parts/activitybar/activitybarPart.ts | Intercepts opens of the shortcut container to toggle Chat via command. |
| src/vs/workbench/test/browser/parts/chatActivityBar.test.ts | Adds unit coverage for constant and registration presence. |
</details>

Applied all three changes in e2c2e41:

1. **`activitybarPart.ts`**: Replaced `Object.create` with a `Proxy` that intercepts only `openPaneComposite` — all other method accesses are forwarded via `Reflect.get` with `.bind(target)`, ensuring `this` always refers to the original `paneCompositePart` instance.

2. **`activitybarPart.ts`**: Removed the duplicate `CHAT_SHORTCUT_VIEW_CONTAINER_ID` static string literal; now imports and uses the `ChatShortcutViewContainerId` constant from `chat.ts`.

3. **`chatActivityBar.test.ts`**: Replaced the dynamic `require()` calls (which also had incorrect relative paths) with static imports for `Registry`, `IViewContainersRegistry`, and `Extensions`. Added an explicit side-effect import of `chatParticipant.contribution.ts` so the view container is guaranteed to be registered regardless of test execution order.']

This PR simplifies chat session state handling by removing the legacy “agent” session option plumbing and an experimental extension-point flag for populating built-in pickers, consolidating restoration behavior around request history / transferred input state.

**Changes:**
- Remove `useRequestToPopulateBuiltInPickers` from `IChatSessionsExtensionPoint` and delete the exported `agentOptionId` constant.
- Always derive initial remote-session input state (mode/model) from the last request’s `modelId` / `modeInstructions` when present (no longer gated by an extension-point flag).
- Delete `ChatInputPart` logic that synchronized the current mode to a session option and restored mode from the `'agent'` session option.

### Reviewed changes

| File | Description |

| `src/vs/workbench/contrib/chat/browser/widget/input/chatInputPart.ts` | Removes reading/writing the agent selection via session options. |



"]

commits:
[{'sha': 'cba2a35e0545b31e0593012a16e0dae7839a9484', 'message': 'agentPlugins: prefix skills with plugin name consistent with commands

- Plugin skills registered via watchPluginPromptFilesForType already get the
  canonical <plugin>:<skill> name, but computeSlashCommandDiscoveryInfo was
  allowing a frontmatter `name:` field to override it, stripping the plugin
  prefix. This made plugin skills appear as `/<skill>` instead of
  `/<plugin-name>:<skill>` in chat, inconsistent with plugin commands.
- Applies getCanonicalPluginCommandId after resolving the raw name so the
  plugin prefix is always preserved, whether the name comes from the SKILL.md
  frontmatter or falls back to the skill directory name.
- Widened the first parameter of getCanonicalPluginCommandId from IAgentPlugin
  to { readonly uri: URI } to allow calling it with just a URI.

(Commit message generated by Copilot)'}]

This PR fixes slash-command discovery for agent plugin skills so that the canonical `<plugin>:<skill>` prefix is always preserved, even when `SKILL.md` frontmatter provides an overriding `name:` field. [{'sha': 'cba2a35e0545b31e0593012a16e0dae7839a9484', 'message': 'agentPlugins: prefix skills with plugin name consistent with commands

- Plugin skills registered via watchPluginPromptFilesForType already get the
  canonical <plugin>:<skill> name, but computeSlashCommandDiscoveryInfo was
  allowing a frontmatter `name:` field to override it, stripping the plugin
  prefix. This made plugin skills appear as `/<skill>` instead of

  frontmatter or falls back to the skill directory name.

  to { readonly uri: URI } to allow calling it with just a URI.

(Commit message generated by Copilot)'}]
